name: Florencia 13
description: Florencia 13 (F13/South Side Florencia 13) is one of the largest Sureño gangs in South Los Angeles with 2,000-3,000+ members, named after the Florence area of LA County. Controlled by the Mexican Mafia. Notorious for racially motivated attacks on African-Americans — in 2007, 102 members were indicted in 'Operation Joker's Wild' (the biggest gang raid in US history at the time), with court testimony confirming race-based targeting. They've expanded to Oregon, Colorado, Florida, Utah, Arizona, Kansas, Mexico, Canada, Brazil, and Germany. In 2022, three members pled guilty to RICO charges for the murder of off-duty LAPD Officer Fernando Arroyos. Allied with Pueblo Bishop Bloods and Harvard Park Brims despite being Sureño.
